title: The Secret Alchemical Parchment [More Magic Series]
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
- More Spell Attributes
- More Runes
### Highly Recommended
- Fallen Paladins and Priests
- Bards
- Druids
- Blood Mages
# 💎 Features
### Brew Powerfull Potions!
 
Brew a vast variety new potions with many effects that will help you on yours adventures! Exclusivly created for the More Magic Series
### Resistances and vulnerability potions:
 
- Blood Endurance and Vulnerability potions that reduce or augment the damage taken of the corresponding type of 30% for each level of the effect
- Corruption Endurance and Vulnerability potions that reduce or augment the damage taken of the corresponding type of 30% for each level of the effect
- Nature Endurance and Vulnerability potions that reduce or augment the damage taken of the corresponding type of 30% for each level of the effect
- Sound Endurance and Vulnerability potions that reduce or augment the damage taken of the corresponding type of 30% for each level of the effect
- Water Enduranceand Vulnerability potions that reduce or augment the damage taken of the corresponding type of 30% for each level of the effect
- Wind Endurance and Vulnerability potions that reduce or augment the damage taken of the corresponding type of 30% for each level of the effect
### Power altering potions:
 

- Potions of Blood Spell Power or Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more or less powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Corruption Spell Power or Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more or less powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Nature Spell Power or Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more or less powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Sound Spell Power or Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more or less powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Water Spell Power or Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more or less powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
- Potions of Wind Spell Power or Weakness that make your magical attacks of the corrisponding magic school more or less powerfull of 20% for each level of the effect
### Variants:
 

The potions are craftable in to long or strong variants, with the use of redstone or glowstone
### Splash Potions, Lingering Potions and Tipped Arrows:
 

Every potion is craftable in to splash potion, lingering potion and tipped arrow
# 🔧 Configuration
**Effects are fully configurable, here the path to the config file:**

- config/the_secret_alchemical_parchment/effects
